Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi B47 Bus Timings from Fatima College to Zaid Bin Al Mualla Mosque

August 3, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system offers affordable and reliable travel across the city and its suburbs. Among its essential routes, Bus B47 connects Fatima College to Zaid Bin Al Mualla Mosque, serving both residential neighborhoods and key amenities.

Operational Details

Bus B47 operates consistently throughout the day, ensuring frequent and convenient service for passengers. Below are the key timings for Bus B47 departing from both Fatima College and Zaid Bin Al Mualla Mosque:

From Fatima College From Zaid Bin Al Mualla Mosque
06:24 05:54
07:25 06:54
08:25 07:54
09:25 08:54
10:25 09:54
11:25 10:54
12:25 11:55
13:25 12:54
14:24 13:55
15:25 14:54
16:25 15:54
17:25 16:54
18:25 17:55
19:26 18:54
20:25 19:55
21:25 20:55
22:26 21:55
22:55  

Bus B47 Timetable

For a complete schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for the B47 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for Bus B47 are made through the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. For travel within one zone, the fare is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can conveniently top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks throughout the city for a smooth, cash-free experience.

Route Overview

Below is the complete list of stops along this route:

  1. Fatima College The starting point, serving students and faculty.

  2. Zayed Higher Organization A vital institution supporting individuals with disabilities.

  3. Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City Main Entrance A major healthcare facility providing comprehensive medical services.

  4. New Al Mafraq Hospital Main Entrance An important stop for medical emergencies and consultations.

  5. Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City East Entrance Access point for additional medical services.

  6. Mafraq Hospital A critical location for healthcare needs.

  7. Mafraq Dental Center Offering specialized dental services.

  8. Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank A banking service stop for daily transactions.

  9. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North A shopping center with diverse retail options.

  10. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall South Another access point to the mall’s various offerings.

  11. GEMS School Catering to the educational needs of local students.

  12. Baniyas Club A community hub for recreational activities.

  13. Salama Bint Butti School Another educational institution on the route.

  14. Municipal Market A local marketplace known for fresh produce and goods.

  15. Hamza Bin Abdulmotalab Secondary School Serving secondary education in the area.

  16. Suhaila Rashid Al Rumaithi Mosque A spiritual stop for community worship.

  17. Baniyas Cooperative Society A convenient stop for groceries and daily necessities.

  18. Taxi Station Providing access to taxi services for further travel.

  19. Souq A traditional marketplace offering a variety of goods.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Maryam Bint Omran School Catering to the educational needs of local families.

  2. Emirates Transport Facilitating transportation services for commuters.

  3. Al Wathba Municipality Providing local government services.

  4. Al Huda Mosque A spiritual stop for community worship.

  5. Al Saqqar Street A residential area offering access to local amenities.

  6. Al Nahda Healthcare Center Providing essential healthcare services.

  7. Al Wathba School Serving educational needs in the community.

27.

Accessibility and Services

Bus B47 is equipped to accommodate passengers with special needs, ensuring that everyone can enjoy a comfortable journey. The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for individuals with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual aids for passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

This makes Bus B47 an inclusive option for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Throughout the journey, passengers on Bus B47 can access several major attractions and landmarks, enhancing their travel experience:

  1. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall A shopping and entertainment destination that caters to various interests.

  2. Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City Not only crucial for healthcare but also a modern architectural landmark.

  3. Municipal Market A cultural hotspot where local traditions come alive through food and commerce.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus B47 from Fatima College to Zaid Bin Al Mualla Mosque offers travelers an engaging journey through Abu Dhabi’s vibrant landscape.

Along the way, passengers pass by residential areas dotted with schools such as GEMS School and Hamza Bin Abdulmotalab Secondary School, reflecting the community’s educational focus, and the Municipal Market, a hub for fresh produce and local goods.

Travel Tips for Bus B47

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to avoid unnecessary waiting, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick, cashless payment on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Utilize the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to optimize your journey.
  • Explore Local Stops: Take time to visit the attractions near each bus stop for a richer travel experience.

In conclusion, Bus B47 provides a reliable and convenient option for traveling between Fatima College and Zaid Bin Al Mualla Mosque.

Whether you’re commuting for work, exploring local markets, or attending religious services, Bus B47 guarantees a smooth and affordable journey. Hop on Bus B47 to effortlessly discover the diverse regions of Abu Dhabi! For more details on all available routes, check out the full Abu Dhabi bus list.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 3, 2025.
